title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, available through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The course is led by David J. Malan and maintains active communities across numerous social platforms.
writeup: Carter Zenke addresses how to approach CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming led by David J. Malan. The video notes that the course is available across multiple platforms, including edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School. It also points to an active global community spanning numerous social media and collaboration platforms.

similar.title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
